subject: Trubbish, a round garbage-bag Pokemon with a wide grin, depicted in a bright aquatic or outdoor setting
description: A small round creature whose body is a torn green garbage bag grins broadly, its large toothy mouth dominating its front face. Multiple horn-like protrusions jut from the top of its head. The art has a bright, teal-aqua palette suggesting a clean or aquatic backdrop, in contrast to the creature's garbage-bag body. The tone is cheerful and almost comedic, the creature's wide eyes and open mouth giving it a playful energy despite its trash-based design.
foreground: Trubbish with open grinning mouth and protruding horns
background: bright aqua and teal tones suggesting water or sky
